approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Foundation queue and injected ACTION-ROUTE-DEDUP-STALENESS-GUARD-001 as a P0 guard to stop duplicate/stale action-route noise and recurring build/process waste, with no live extraction, auth-required or paid runs, external writes, Drive permission mutation, Agent Feedback auto-send, or Harlan/Fal/voice/Canva/OpenHuman feature work.
scopeSummary: Add duplicate grouping and stale-risk policy to the Action Route Review Inbox so repeated unresolved proposed findings are linked, stale items have yellow/red next actions, history remains intact, and the live route/verifier/UI share the same contract.
constraints: No transcript fetch, screenshot capture, crawl, summarization, model call, or provider probe.
No auto-delete, auto-hide, auto-reject, or auto-snooze of review items.
requiredProof: focused proof dogfoods duplicate grouping, linked route/backlog rows, stale yellow/red thresholds, and malformed stale output rejection
live Current Sprint metadata is complete before building_now
live Review Inbox route carries dedupStaleness, dedupeKey, duplicateClusterIds, and staleness fields
control-loop verifier checks the live API contract
backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, and process:foundation-ship pass
notes: This is Foundation read-model/process work only. Dedupe/staleness surfaces operator risk and next action; it does not erase history or mutate external systems.
